steps.title: Spot the cause-and-effect structure
steps.content: The passage first explains Precisionist values (cold, machine-like perfection, geometric shapes), then describes what subjects they actually painted. The third sentence presents what naturally results from the second.

steps.title: Match the transition to consequential logic
steps.content:
Accordingly signals logical consequence—the subjects Precisionists painted follow naturally from their stated aesthetic values.

However, That said, and In the end introduce contrast, qualification, or conclusion respectively, none of which fit a logical consequence.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
